title: Desk Booking and Hybrid Office Management System

prd.oneLiner: Connect desk maps, availability, reservations, team office plans, facilities issues, and utilization analysis.
prd.goal: Reduce peak-time desk booking conflicts and make desk utilization visible.
prd.whyNow: In hybrid work, desk availability and team attendance plans are separated, making empty seats and colleague location difficult to find.
prd.problem: In hybrid work, desk availability and team attendance plans are separated, making empty seats and colleague location difficult to find.
prd.solution: Connect desk maps, availability, reservations, team office plans, facilities issues, and utilization analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee booking an office desk
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: In hybrid work, desk availability and team attendance plans are separated, making empty seats and colleague location difficult to find.

targets.name: Workplace and general affairs operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: In hybrid work, desk availability and team attendance plans are separated, making empty seats and colleague location difficult to find.

scenarios.text: Employee booking an office desk completes desk, parking, and office-day reservation submission and checks progress.
Workplace and general affairs operations coordinator reviews desk utilization, no-show, and zone-demand reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce peak-time desk booking conflicts and make desk utilization visible.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Desk, parking, and office-day reservation submission
Desk availability, reservation, and team attendance lookup
Desk allocation, reservation change, and facilities-issue handling
Desk utilization, no-show, and zone-demand reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
